headline: Assessing SLB (SLB) Valuation After Tachyus Deal And AI Leadership Recognition
summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) is back in focus after agreeing to acquire reservoir modelling specialist Tachyus and earning top scores for artificial intelligence adoption. These moves push its digital oilfield ambitions further into the spotlight for investors. See our latest analysis for SLB. At a share price of US$56.85, SLB has delivered a 41.42% year to date share price return and a 75.70% total shareholder return over the past year, with recent digital deals, AI recognition and a new shelf...

headline: Oil Services Are Setting Up to Do It Again, But There’s a Catch the Strait of Hormuz Trade Can’t Ignore
summary: If you put $10,000 into the VanEck Oil Services ETF (NYSEARCA:OIH) at the closing bell on December 31, 2025, you were sitting on roughly $15,100 five months later. The fund opened the year at $285 and closed June 2 at $430, a 51% year-to-date gain. Over the same window, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust ... Oil Services Are Setting Up to Do It Again, But There’s a Catch the Strait of Hormuz Trade Can’t Ignore

headline: How Is SLB N.V.'s Stock Performance Compared to Other Energy Stocks
summary: SLB N.V. has outperformed other energy stocks, and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s outlook.
